[State of TMT (5 February 2020). 1 MB](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/media/Stand-van-tmt-februari-2018_tcm16-70905.pdf)
Favourable economic climate. The economic climate is favourable for the TMT sector. The Dutch economy grew by 3.2% in 2017, and in 2018 GDP will increase by 2.9%. The main economic indicators are also positive. Producer confidence and consumer confidence are high, capacity utilisation in industry is high, exports continue to pick up and the number of jobs and vacancies keeps rising.

metadata.chunk_id: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector__c5-sentence-window__0009
metadata.source_slug: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector
metadata.source_title: IT sector is the strongest grower within the TMT sector

id: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector__c5-sentence-window__0010
text: The economic climate is favourable for the TMT sector. The Dutch economy grew by 3.2% in 2017, and in 2018 GDP will increase by 2.9%. The main economic indicators are also positive. Producer confidence and consumer confidence are high, capacity utilisation in industry is high, exports continue to pick up and the number of jobs and vacancies keeps rising. Fewer and fewer obstacles in the sector, but labour shortages remain a problem.

metadata.chunk_id: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector__c5-sentence-window__0010
metadata.source_slug: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector
metadata.source_title: IT sector is the strongest grower within the TMT sector

id: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector__c5-sentence-window__0011
text: The Dutch economy grew by 3.2% in 2017, and in 2018 GDP will increase by 2.9%. The main economic indicators are also positive. Producer confidence and consumer confidence are high, capacity utilisation in industry is high, exports continue to pick up and the number of jobs and vacancies keeps rising. Fewer and fewer obstacles in the sector, but labour shortages remain a problem. Entrepreneurs in the sector experience fewer obstacles to running their businesses.

text: The main economic indicators are also positive. Producer confidence and consumer confidence are high, capacity utilisation in industry is high, exports continue to pick up and the number of jobs and vacancies keeps rising. Fewer and fewer obstacles in the sector, but labour shortages remain a problem. Entrepreneurs in the sector experience fewer obstacles to running their businesses. However, the labour shortage remains a major problem.

metadata.chunk_id: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector__c5-sentence-window__0012

id: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector__c5-sentence-window__0013
text: Producer confidence and consumer confidence are high, capacity utilisation in industry is high, exports continue to pick up and the number of jobs and vacancies keeps rising. Fewer and fewer obstacles in the sector, but labour shortages remain a problem. Entrepreneurs in the sector experience fewer obstacles to running their businesses. However, the labour shortage remains a major problem. More than one-fifth of entrepreneurs are severely affected by this.

metadata.chunk_id: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector__c5-sentence-window__0013
metadata.source_slug: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector
metadata.source_title: IT sector is the strongest grower within the TMT sector

id: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector__c5-sentence-window__0014
text: Fewer and fewer obstacles in the sector, but labour shortages remain a problem. Entrepreneurs in the sector experience fewer obstacles to running their businesses. However, the labour shortage remains a major problem. More than one-fifth of entrepreneurs are severely affected by this. Business confidence in the sector has fallen slightly, but at 13.3 it is still at a high level.

metadata.chunk_id: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector__c5-sentence-window__0014
metadata.source_slug: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector
metadata.source_title: IT sector is the strongest grower within the TMT sector

id: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector__c5-sentence-window__0015
text: Entrepreneurs in the sector experience fewer obstacles to running their businesses. However, the labour shortage remains a major problem. More than one-fifth of entrepreneurs are severely affected by this. Business confidence in the sector has fallen slightly, but at 13.3 it is still at a high level. IT sector is the driving force; publishers, printers and telecoms in the red.

metadata.chunk_id: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector__c5-sentence-window__0015
metadata.source_slug: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector
metadata.source_title: IT sector is the strongest grower within the TMT sector

id: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector__c5-sentence-window__0016
text: However, the labour shortage remains a major problem. More than one-fifth of entrepreneurs are severely affected by this. Business confidence in the sector has fallen slightly, but at 13.3 it is still at a high level. IT sector is the driving force; publishers, printers and telecoms in the red. The IT companies segment, the largest within TMT, continues to grow strongly.

metadata.chunk_id: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector__c5-sentence-window__0016

id: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector__c5-sentence-window__0017
text: More than one-fifth of entrepreneurs are severely affected by this. Business confidence in the sector has fallen slightly, but at 13.3 it is still at a high level. IT sector is the driving force; publishers, printers and telecoms in the red. The IT companies segment, the largest within TMT, continues to grow strongly. Ongoing digitalisation and a favourable economic climate are the reasons for this.

metadata.chunk_id: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector__c5-sentence-window__0017

id: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector__c5-sentence-window__0018
text: Business confidence in the sector has fallen slightly, but at 13.3 it is still at a high level. IT sector is the driving force; publishers, printers and telecoms in the red. The IT companies segment, the largest within TMT, continues to grow strongly. Ongoing digitalisation and a favourable economic climate are the reasons for this. Wholesale trade in ICT and TV content companies also benefit from the economic boom.

Wholesale trade in ICT and TV content companies also benefit from the economic boom. However, there are also segments that are struggling. Publishers, printers and telecoms will also show revenue decline next year.
